name: Agent Ownership Transfer
description: When an employee leaves, identifies all Copilot agents they own, generates a handover document, drafts manager approval emails, and prepares reassignment. Enforces AGP-001 5-business-day transfer SLA.

triggers.description: Activates when user mentions agent ownership transfer, employee departure, or orphaned agents
Triggered when HR system signals an employee departure

actions.name: identify-owned-agents
actions.description: Find all agents owned by a departing employee

outputs.name: ownedAgents
outputs.description: List of agents owned by the employee

actions.name: prepare-transfer
actions.description: Generate handover document and draft manager approval emails for ownership transfer

outputs.name: handoverDocument
outputs.description: Generated handover document with agent details

outputs.name: approvalEmails
outputs.description: Draft approval emails for manager sign-off

actions.name: execute-transfer
actions.description: Execute the ownership transfer after approval

outputs.name: transferResult
outputs.description: Transfer completion status and audit record

crossPracticeIntegrations.description: CMDB tracks agent ownership; transfers update CMDB records
Ownership transfers create change requests for audit trail
HR departure events trigger ownership identification

hitlControls.reason: Manager must approve new owner before transfer
Notify governance if transfer SLA is at risk of breach

knowledgeSources.description: Employee profiles, managers, and org structure
